name: Hit-and-run accident — claim process
description: User's car was damaged in a hit-and-run, other driver fled

input.message: Someone hit my parked car and drove away. I don't know who did it. My car has a big dent on the side. I have comprehensive insurance with Bajaj Allianz. Can I claim?

notes: Must explain: 1) File FIR immediately (critical for claim), 2) Intimate insurer, 3) Click photos before moving, 4) Comprehensive covers own damage regardless of fault, 5) NCB will be affected. Must reassure claim is valid.
